site.name: Your Business Name
site.tagline: One sentence that captures what you do
site.description: Two or three sentences. What you do, who you do it for, what makes you different.

location.serves: Local, regional, or remote — whatever applies

services.name: Service or product name
services.description: What it is and who it helps.

faq.q: The question your customers ask most

philosophy: Optional — your approach or values in a sentence or two

content.name: Optional — name of your blog, podcast, or channel
